rationale: Valid step and objective attachment selection now only clears the attachment-limit submit message, preserving legacy branch warnings and other unrelated submit warnings.
Step attachment counting now uses the existing selected attachment count and step delta instead of constructing a temporary aggregate array, and unrelated submit messages are preserved.
Objective attachment selection now clears submitMessage only when it matches the attachment limit message, so unrelated validation errors remain visible.
Top-level automated review summary with no separate actionable request.
Top-level automated review summary; the actionable inline feedback from the same review is addressed separately.
